title: Inventory Slots
description: A Fabric Minecraft mod for viewing container slot index's at the click of a button! Useful for development/configuration!
body:
# InventorySlots

InventorySlots is a lightweight Fabric mod designed for developers and UI configurators. It provides a client-side overlay for inventory slots, making it easier to visualize slot indices and debug layout positioning in real-time.

### Features
The mod includes a built-in configuration menu that allows for live adjustments without requiring a game restart.

* Customizable text scale (0.25x to 2.0x) and hex color support.
* Multiple anchor points for precise text alignment (e.g., top-left, center, bottom-right).
* Optional text shadowing for better visibility against different UI textures.
* Persisted configuration settings across game sessions.
* Fully client-side implementation; compatible with all servers.

### Keybinds
* Toggle Overlays: `HOME`
* Open Config Menu: `END`

Note: Keybinds can be remapped via the standard Minecraft controls menu if they conflict with other mods.

### Requirements
This mod requires Minecraft 1.21.4 or newer and the following dependencies:
* Fabric API

### Support
For bug reports or feature requests, please submit an issue through the GitHub repository:
https://github.com/BitByLogics/InventorySlots/issues
